allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Output 'Docker Desktop launch requested'")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; cfg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); auths=cfg.get\('auths',{}\); reg=auths.get\('mx-queretaro-1.ocir.io',{}\); print\('auth field present:', bool\(reg.get\('auth',''\)\)\); print\('credsStore:', cfg.get\('credsStore','none'\)\); print\('credHelpers:', cfg.get\('credHelpers',{}\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; u=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('name:', u['name']\); print\('email:', u.get\('email','N/A'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; cfg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); auths=cfg.get\('auths',{}\); [print\(f'registry: {k}, user: {v.get\(\\"username\\",\\"N/A\\"\)}'\) for k,v in auths.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('/tmp/todo_resp.json'\)\); print\(f'Items returned: {len\(data\)}'\); [print\(f'  - [{d[\\"id\\"]}] {d[\\"description\\"]} | estado={d.get\(\\"estado\\"\)} | done={d.get\(\\"done\\"\)}'\) for d in data[:5]]")
